product_overview: ReviewLens is an AI-powered review intelligence platform that turns product review URLs from supported marketplaces into actionable analysis reports. Users can review sentiment, pain points, praises, improvement ideas, and competitor signals, with paid plans unlocking exports, dashboards, and comparisons.
core_goals: Analyze a supported product review URL and generate an AI-based report
Review sentiment breakdowns, star distributions, pain points, praises, and improvement suggestions
Save and revisit past reports with a paid plan
Compare two products side-by-side using review data
Upgrade to paid plans to unlock advanced analysis features

features.name: Review Analysis
features.description: Users can submit a supported product URL and receive an AI-generated review analysis report.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Paste a product URL -> Submit the analysis request -> See loading phases -> View the generated report on /analyze
Navigate to / -> Select an example URL -> See the URL auto-filled -> Submit the analysis request -> See loading phases -> View the generated report on /analyze
Navigate to / -> Paste a supported product URL -> Submit the analysis request -> Use the free analysis quota until the limit is reached -> See the paywall modal with upgrade options

features.name: Analysis Report Display
features.description: Users can review a detailed report showing sentiment, review themes, competitor signals, and sharing/export actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /analyze -> View the product name, platform, and total reviews analyzed -> Review sentiment statistics -> Inspect the star distribution -> Read pain points, praises, and suggested improvements -> View the competitor signal when available
Navigate to /analyze -> View the report -> Copy the report link -> Confirm the link is ready to share
Navigate to /analyze -> View the report as a Pro user -> Export the report to PDF -> Receive a downloadable PDF copy
Navigate to /analyze -> View the report as a free user -> See the upgrade prompt for restricted export features

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can access email-based magic link sign-in and return to the home page from login.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter an email address -> Request a magic link -> See the confirmation message telling them to check their email
Navigate to /login -> Use the back navigation option -> Return to /

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Signed-in Pro and Agency users can view and open their saved analysis reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard while signed in -> View the list of past reports -> Open a report card -> View the saved analysis page
Navigate to /dashboard as a free user -> See the upgrade prompt instead of saved reports

features.name: Competitor Comparison
features.description: Pro and Agency users can compare two products side-by-side using review analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /compare while signed in with a paid plan -> Enter a Product A URL -> Enter a Product B URL -> Start the comparison -> View the executive summary and overall winner -> Review strengths, weaknesses, and feature-by-feature results
Navigate to /compare while signed in with a paid plan -> Complete a comparison -> Start another comparison -> See the form reset for a new run

features.name: Payment and Plan Upgrade
features.description: Users can open checkout flows to upgrade to Pro or Agency plans through the pricing and upgrade entry points.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the pricing section -> Choose a Pro or Agency plan -> Start checkout -> Complete the purchase flow -> Return with the selected plan activated
Navigate to / -> Use the header upgrade entry point -> Start checkout for Pro -> Complete the purchase flow -> Return with the selected plan activated
Navigate to /analyze as a free user -> Select the upgrade prompt -> Start checkout -> Complete the purchase flow -> Return with access to paid features

features.name: Free Usage Limit
features.description: Free users can track their remaining analyses and encounter an upgrade prompt after using the free quota.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Submit analyses until the free quota is used -> View the usage counter in the footer after each run -> Reach 3 analyses -> See the paywall modal with upgrade options

routes.description: Home page with URL input for review analysis, pricing section, and example URLs
Magic link login page using Supabase OTP
Displays AI-generated analysis report for a product URL
Shows user's saved reports (Pro/Agency plans only)
Compare two products side-by-side (Pro/Agency plans only)

features.name: Review Analysis
features.description: Paste a product URL (Amazon, G2, Trustpilot) to get an AI-powered review analysis report
user_interactions: Paste a product URL into the input field
See loading phases (Detecting platform, Fetching reviews, Running AI analysis)
Click example URL buttons to auto-fill

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Magic link email authentication via Supabase

features.name: Analysis Report Display
features.description: View detailed AI analysis report with sentiment, pain points, praises, improvements
user_interactions: Read pain points with severity tags

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View history of past analysis reports (Pro/Agency only)
user_interactions: Click a report card to view it
See upgrade prompt if on free plan

features.name: Competitor Comparison
features.description: Compare two products side-by-side based on their reviews (Pro/Agency only)
user_interactions: View strengths and weaknesses for each product

features.name: Payment / Checkout
features.description: LemonSqueezy checkout for Pro ($29/mo) and Agency ($79/mo) plans
user_interactions: Click Get Pro button in header
Click Upgrade to Pro button in paywall
Click Get Agency button in paywall
Click plan cards in pricing section

features.name: Free Usage Limit
features.description: Free users get 3 analyses before hitting a paywall
user_interactions: See usage counter in footer (X/3 free analyses used)
See paywall modal after 3 uses with upgrade options

known_limitations.issue: Report data is stored in sessionStorage, not persisted for free users
known_limitations.impact: Reports are lost when the browser tab is closed

known_limitations.issue: Plan status is stored in localStorage token, not verified server-side on each request
known_limitations.impact: Could be bypassed by manually setting localStorage

known_limitations.issue: Google and Yelp platforms are listed as "coming soon"
known_limitations.impact: Only Amazon, G2, and Trustpilot are supported
